# Mohit Ranka

> Engineering leader. Builder of data platforms, developer tooling, and reliable distributed backends.

Mohit Ranka is an engineering leader focused on data platforms, developer tooling, and reliable distributed backends. He prefers clarity over cleverness, long-term impact over short wins, and systems that scale from one team to many.

Experience highlights:
- LinkedIn: consolidated diverse data sources into a near-real-time platform
- Postman: led the web launch
- Booking.com: built identity and SSO systems

Location and background: India; B.Tech. from Vellore Institute of Technology.

Primary contact: mohitranka@gmail.com
Site: https://www.mohitranka.com

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.mohitranka.com/): About Mohit Ranka — background, focus areas, and selected writing
- [Writing](https://www.mohitranka.com/blog.html): Selected technical writing on systems and data
- [Contact](https://www.mohitranka.com/contact/): Email contact for architecture, reliability, or AI-system topics

## Writing

- [RDBMS vs. NOSQL?](https://www.mohitranka.com/blog/rdbms-vs-nosql/): When relational databases fit highly available ecommerce platforms and when they do not (2013)
